title: AMIF! - Another Minecraft Inspired Fakedex
description: This project aims to create fakemons based on Minecraft mobs while combining differents ideas from the original game and the spin-offs!!
body:
**In order to play with the mons simply add the downloaded archive to you resourcepack and datapack folder inside you gamefiles.
Make sure to have the original cobblemon mod installed!!**

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Sadly i can't add the starters to the beggining screen through the datapack, but here's the code you need to add in the starters.json file:

File location = "Minecraft folder">config>cobblemon>starters.json


_
,

    {
      "name": "Farlandia",
      "displayName": "Farlandia",
      "pokemon": [
        "tatlaze level=5",
        "axolucket level=5",
        "whispbloom level=5"
      ]
    }
_

simply paste the above code in the file after the last but one "}"

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The fakemons in this pack will be based in all minecraft related midia mobs (dungeons, legends, movie), i hope you guys enjoy my ideas!

~~**_THE STARTERS:_**

Tatlaze - The main idea was a blaze starter transforming into wild fire, Made the armadillo the second inspiration for the mon. 
(Spawn in nether structures and in the badlands).

[Tatlaze -> Blazadillo -> Apire]

Axolucket - Wanted to make an Nautilus mon, decided on mixing him with the axolot, the conduit and using the bucket as his shell/conduit structure, as it evolves it will have more nautilus features. 
(Spawn in Lush Caves)

[Axolucket -> Nautilot -> Condaxolus]

Whispbloom - Main inspiration is the Mooblom, Mixed it with the floral creatures from Minecraft Dungeons and decided on the mon being mainly a flower. 
(Spawn in Sunflower Fields)

[Whispbloom -> Mooleap -> Bellowblosom]~~

 ~~**_VILLAGE DWELLERS:_**

 Bludgymph - The main idea for this evolution line was to create a pokemon based on the guardian vex mixed with caracteristics from the hero related armors in Minecraft Dungeons, and since the vexes remind me of nymphs/fairies i added the disguise theme to the evolutionary line in order to alude to the greek stories of nymphs being deceivers. I also made its evolution resemble the totem of undying and hero of the villlage effect. 
 (Spawn in villages/forests at night)

 [Bludgymph -> Smitefae] 

 Tradicuna - The inspirations for this evolutionary line was the llama, the wandering trader and their quirks, making surianderer have drool with invisibility capabilities as long as he is fed fermented spider eyes, but to overfed it will create in it a never ending hunger for spiders. also through surianderer psychic abilities it can store in its fur unlimited items, being the perfect pokemon for wandering traders. 
 (Spawn in villages and mountains, Llamoison spawns at night and underground)

[Tradicuna -> Surianderer -> Llamoison] 

Ballifiggy/Granfiggy/Honefiggy - The little golens are all based on the golens from minecraft legends but with small alterations: 
ballifiggy having more balista features, granfiggy being based on aqueducts and honefiggy resembling real life grindstones. 
My main idea for Isarnfiggy was the golens in Minecraft dungeons being stacked on top of each other and those giant robots in the power rangers, lol.
(Spawn in villages)

[Ballifiggy/Granfiggy/Honefiggy -> Isarnfiggy]~~
